{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image=Pretender's Mask.png
|description=The Traveler known as Faceless capitalized on its camouflage abilities to sneak into enemy bases and scout. To improve concealment, it ordered the Snail Shell, only to demand a refund soon after a series of blown operations...
|affct=CIV
|hard=DEF
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=1914
|relic1=Ouroboros Mark
|relic2=Lamassu Statue
|relic3=Capitoline Wolf
|relic4=Two-headed Serpent
|relic5=Nemean Lion's Hide
}}
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=8
|fire=6
|wind=6
|form=Mutant
|element=Wind
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=ATK
}}
